end,function(m)V[m]=V[m]-(179495-179494)if 1048324+-1048324==V[m]then V[m],P[m]=nil,nil end end,function(m,T)local F=p(T)local u=function(u,h)return K(m,{u,h},T,F)end return u end,function(K,u,h,U)local g,Zf,f,D,O,v,C,N,H,zf,uf,q,L,Qf,j,c,x,Uf,X,Kf,Vf,Tf,e,Mf,V,yf,R,a,d,sf,I,pf,mf,xf,w,B,Rf,hf,Y,S,l,y,b,p,t,r,k,J,Nf,W,E,Ff,o,Pf while K do if K<-511508+9152285 then if
